acceptance_criteria: Home timeline shows posts from followed accounts in reverse chronological order; pagination via Link header works; empty timeline returns [] not error; posts from both local and remote followed accounts appear; boosted posts appear as boost wrapper with reblog field
description: Implement the home timeline: a paginated feed of posts from accounts the authed persona follows. Computed on read via SQL query — no fanout, no cache. Includes local posts from followed accounts and remote posts from followed remote accounts. Supports max_id, since_id, min_id, limit params. Returns Status objects with full serialization.
design: Query: SELECT p.* FROM posts p JOIN follows f ON p.account_id = f.followee_id WHERE f.follower_id = ? UNION SELECT rp.* FROM remote_posts rp JOIN follows f ON rp.remote_account_id = f.followee_remote_id WHERE f.follower_id = ? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT ? — then serialize each to Status. Snowflake-based pagination.
title: GET /api/v1/timelines/home
